name: Strict Medieval Roleplay
description:
A Strict Medieval RPG

Majority Of the roleplay is historically based, the only minor changes are the continent names and the planet names but overall it refers to the dark ages or middle ages or the dark ages, Gunpowder could be obtained from the eastern continent Asean, There is also america which is named Patagonia and Cascadia. Hope you enjoy <3
